ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval entry */,
  "time_from" REAL /* Start time of the interval */,
  "time_to" REAL /* End time of the interval */,
  "tile_from" INTEGER /* Identifier for the starting tile */,
  "tile_to" INTEGER /* Identifier for the ending tile */,
  "probability" REAL /* Calculated probability for the specified interval and tile range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the interval */,
  "source" TEXT /* Identifier or name of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the interval (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tiles" (
  "tile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile */,
  "tile_name" TEXT /* Name of the tile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the tile */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location or coordinates of the tile */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tile (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probability_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis conducted */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time interval being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., regression, forecasting) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical model used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store the parameters used in the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probability_analysis_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES time_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probability_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
